surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-stone-200), no shadow by default, hover: shadow-sm, hover:-translate-y-[2px] transition-transform
surfaces.headers: Solid background with hard bottom border, sticky top-0, z-50

components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#6AAF35] hover:bg-[#5C982E] text-white. Secondary: bg-white border border-[#E7E5E4] text-[#1C1917] hover:bg-stone-100
components.tables: Shadcn UI tables with dense padding. Use border-collapse. Headers should have muted text and uppercase tracking. Sticky headers for long tables.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#6AAF35]/30 focus:border-[#6AAF35]
components.charts: Shadcn charts (Recharts). Use #6AAF35 for revenue/profit, #F5A623 for secondary metrics or comparison.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must change state on hover (e.g. darker background or slight shadow lift)
interactions_and_motion.loading: Use skeleton loaders (Shadcn Skeleton) instead of spinners where possible

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Implement pure React + Tailwind for layout, use Shadcn components for complex interactions like DatePickers, Tables, and Selects.
Configure Tailwind with the exact brand colors: primary: '#6AAF35', accent: '#F5A623'.
Dashboard should be strictly mobile-responsive, prioritizing the 'Control Room' grid on large screens and 'grid-cols-1' on mobile.
Use Phosphor Icons (Regular or Duotone weight) for dashboard iconography.
Ensure high contrast text (APCA standard) over any background. #FAFAF9 is the base background, cards are #FFFFFF.
For PDF generation, keep the layout functional and print-friendly (hide non-essential UI elements like sidebars when generating).
Use Recharts (via Shadcn) for revenue trends, profit trends, campaign comparison, and source split pie charts.
